summary: Home page to Upgrade Plan to Home page - Free User
description: GIVEN a Free user is on the Home page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Upgrade Plan" tab in the navigation header
AND selects one of the subscription package tiles on the Subscriptions page
AND the user selects the "back" button twice
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Home page
AND focus is assigned to the featured image in the Hero
